extension.description:
Zeus768's Kodi addon repository.
Available Addons: - SALTS (Stream All The Sources) - Multi-source video addon with torrent scrapers, Jackett/Prowlarr support, Real-Debrid/Premiumize/AllDebrid, and Trakt.tv integration - Orion - Torrent and usenet indexer - Strike Zone - Sports streaming addon - The Accountant - Kodi maintenance and debrid management tool - ResolveURL - URL resolver module
Also includes Gujal Repository and ResolveURL Repository for dependencies.
